content: Phase 4: Get Emergent Google OAuth integration playbook
Phase 4: Backend — Auth (Emergent OAuth) + User model + Admin role detection
Phase 4: Backend — Newsletter subscribers collection + endpoints
Phase 4: Backend — Bookmarks collection + endpoints (toggle, list)
Phase 4: Backend — Comment moderation (is_hidden flag + admin endpoints)
Phase 4: Backend — Image upload endpoint with Pillow WebP compression (800px, q=75)
Phase 4: Frontend — Auth context + Login/Profile/Sign-out UI + AuthCallback
Phase 4: Frontend — Admin route guard (admin only)
Phase 4: Frontend — Bookmarks (heart icon on cards/article + /bookmarks page)
Phase 4: Frontend — Newsletter signup hits real backend
Phase 4: Frontend — Related stories block on Article page
Phase 4: Frontend — Comment polling every 7s + admin moderation panel /admin/comments
Phase 4: Frontend — Image upload widget in Admin article form
Phase 4: Frontend — SEO (react-helmet-async): dynamic title, OG, Twitter, JSON-LD NewsArticle
